notes: The previous role branch asked crude role Monte Carlo to replace the point model and failed. This manifest tests a smaller, more plausible hypothesis: keep the scaled archetype model and blend in a small role simulation.
The role signal is still mostly inferred from official residuals because the current broad cache has zero scout-enriched rows.
